title: Delhi High Court protects TV9 from “groundless" copyright strikes by foreign media
description: The Delhi High Court recently restrained certain foreign entities, including a Turkey-based media organization, from making “groundless" copyright infringement threats against Indian media organization TV9 Network [Associated Broadcasting Company Limited Vs Google LLC & Ors].Justice Tejas Karia was dealing with TV9 Network's plea challenging the copyright strikes issued against it on YouTube by these foreign entities (defendants) over use of their videos covering natural calamities and globa
